latin: Iudica me non ex victoriis sed ex animo quo ludo. non refert si vincimus an vincimur — refert quomodo nos geramus. biscoctum?

questions.prompt: What does Ted think matters more than winning?
questions.target: The spirit in which you play and how you behave
choices: The spirit in which you play and how you behave

questions.prompt: What does Ted offer at the end?

translation: Judge me not by victories but by the spirit in which I play. It doesn't matter if we win or lose — what matters is how we conduct ourselves. Biscuit?
